title: Node
description: Node: 0D finite element for lighting analysis. Node class contains positional information and is used to build AnalysisGrids and provide links between model geometry and analytical results

ID.description: An ID for this node to identify it within result lists and on an analysis grid. ID should be unique and not shared with other nodes in the same grid

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
